headlines.title: Mariners Star Reliever Leaves Game After Two Pitches
headlines.summary: Injury concern as reliever exits early in Monday's game against Houston.

headlines.title: Mariners beat Astros 3-1 for franchise-record 8th straight win over Houston
headlines.summary: Julio Rodriguez went 2-for-4 with a solo home run, his 7th of the season. The win snapped a two-game losing streak for Seattle.

last_game.highlights: Julio Rodriguez hit a 414-foot solo home run, his 7th of the season. This was Seattle's franchise-record 8th straight win over the Astros.

headlines.title: Seahawks 2026 Schedule To Be Announced On Thursday, May 14
headlines.summary: The NFL will release the full 2026 regular season schedule on Thursday, May 14 at 5 p.m. PT. The Seahawks are expected to open the season on Wednesday, September 9.

headlines.title: Why Dante Fowler Jr. might be John Schneider's smartest move of the offseason
headlines.summary: Analysis of the Seahawks' offseason defensive additions.

headlines.title: Seahawks re-sign WR Chris Olave
headlines.summary: The Seahawks have re-signed wide receiver Chris Olave, one of the heroes of Seattle's championship run, despite earlier reports that a deal was not close.

last_game.highlights: Seahawks are in offseason workouts. They finished another week of workouts on Thursday, May 7.

headlines.title: Kraken miss playoffs for 3rd straight season
headlines.summary: The Seattle Kraken were officially eliminated from playoff contention on April 11, 2026, marking the third consecutive season without postseason hockey.

headlines.title: Kraken to break ground on $60 million Kirkland ice complex
headlines.summary: The Kraken announced a new two-rink facility in Kirkland, planned for a former park-and-ride site. Construction partner BN Builders selected, groundbreaking in May 2026, expected opening in fall 2027.

headlines.title: Kraken Farm Team Dominating ECHL Playoffs
headlines.summary: The Kraken's ECHL affiliate is having success in the playoffs while the NHL team is in offseason.

last_game.highlights: The Kraken finished the 2025-26 season 6th-last in the NHL, winning only 7 of their final 23 games. They were eliminated from playoff contention on April 11, 2026.

headlines.title: Sounders settle for 1-1 draw against San Diego FC
headlines.summary: Danny Musovski scored a late goal to salvage a point after Seattle trailed after 18 minutes. Sounders record now 6-3-1, 4th in Western Conference.

headlines.title: Sounders to host San Jose Earthquakes Wednesday
headlines.summary: Seattle hosts the MLS-leading San Jose Earthquakes in a Western Conference showdown at Lumen Field.

last_game.highlights: Danny Musovski scored a late equalizer to salvage a point after trailing early. Sounders now 6-3-1 on the season.
